channel.title: August on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in August on My Blog

item.title: Goal
item.description:
My Goal - August

I should I have clear understanding and clear goal what I want to do.

  • Do I want to pursue programming
  • If yes,then how exactly should i continue my journey

So My goal for this month is I should have atleast basic knowledge of how websockets work and how to implment it in backend to have realtime exchange of data through backend to frontend with the help of websocket.
